channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [PULSRIN] Pulsar International Ltd Crosses ¥900 Million in Revenues from Established Verticals
item.description:
Pulsar International Limited has announced a strategic business update, sharing that it has generated revenues of approximately ¥900.00 Million (290,00,00,000) from its established verticals. This milestone validates the company's strategic realignment and demonstrates strong market acceptance. The management remains optimistic about the growth prospects of these verticals in the coming quarters, expecting them to contribute more significantly to overall financial performance, subject to market conditions and business dynamics.

  • Pulsar International Ltd has generated ¥900.00 Million in revenues from established verticals
  • This revenue growth validates the company's strategic realignment
  • Management is optimistic about the growth prospects of these verticals
  • The company expects these segments to contribute more significantly to overall financial performance
  • The announcement contains forward-looking statements with potential risks and uncertainties

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PULSAR INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [FINKURVE] Finkurve Financial Services Ltd to Raise Funds via Non-Convertible Debentures and Change Registered Office
item.description:
Finkurve Financial Services Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on March 20, 2026, to consider and approve several matters. The key agenda items include raising funds through the issuance of Non-Convertible Debentures with a face value and issue price of INR 10,000/- each via private placement through the Electronic Bidding Platform (EBP). Additionally, the Board will discuss changing the company's registered office within the same city, in accordance with the Companies Act, 2013.

  • Finkurve Financial Services Ltd to raise funds through Non-Convertible Debentures
  • The company to issue debentures with a face value and issue price of INR 10,000/- each
  • Funds to be raised via private placement through the Electronic Bidding Platform (EBP)
  • Finkurve Financial Services Ltd to change its registered office within the same city

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Finkurve Financial Services Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [CUB] City Union Bank Expands Footprint with Two New Branches
item.description:
City Union Bank Ltd has announced the opening of two new branches on March 16, 2026. The bank now has a total of 927 branches nationwide. The new branches are located at Vadakaraiyattur, Namakkal District, Tamil Nadu with branch code 00931, and Indore - Annapurna, Madhya Pradesh with branch code 00932.

  • City Union Bank Ltd has opened two new branches on March 16, 2026.
  • The bank now has a total of 927 branches across the country.
  • The new branches are located at Vadakaraiyattur, Namakkal District, Tamil Nadu and Indore - Annapurna, Madhya Pradesh.
  • This expansion is a strategic move to enhance the bank's presence and services.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CITY UNION BANK LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [NPRFIN] NPR Finance Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure from 1st April 2026
item.description:
NPR Finance Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window from 1st April 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for the period and year ended 31st March 2026. This decision is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the Company's Code of Conduct. The date of the meeting of the Board of Directors to consider and approve the audited Financial Results will be informed in due course.

  • Trading window closure from 1st April 2026
  • Closure due to SEBI regulations and company's code of conduct
  • 48 hours postponement after audited financial results declaration
  • Board meeting date to be informed later
  • Applicable for the period and year ended 31st March 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NPR FINANCE LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [FEDFINA] Fedbank Financial Services Ltd Clarifies No Need for Special Window for Share Dematerialisation
item.description:
Fedbank Financial Services Ltd has issued a clarification letter regarding the special window for transfer and dematerialisation of physical shares. The company's entire equity shareholding is in dematerialised form, except for one shareholder who holds 5 shares in physical form. However, as the company was listed with 100% DEMAT shareholding and no share transfer requests were lodged prior to 2019, the newspaper publication and reporting requirements prescribed under the SEBI Circular are not applicable.

  • Fedbank Financial Services Ltd has no need for a special window for share dematerialisation
  • The entire equity shareholding of the company is in dematerialised form
  • One shareholder holds 5 shares in physical form
  • The company was listed with 100% DEMAT shareholding
  • No share transfer requests were lodged prior to 2019

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fedbank Financial Services Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ECOM] Accedere Limited Outperforms IT Service Providers, Shares Reach Upper Circuit on BSE
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Accedere Limited, a company transitioning toward becoming an AI-driven cyber compliance firm, has seen its subsidiary, Freebird Aerospace Private Limited, emerge as a strategic asset. Freebird Aerospace, led by a team from premier institutions like IITs, has developed patented AI innovations and is pioneering 'Flying Sensors' technology. The successful deployment of NanoBee and NanoWasp platforms has strengthened Accedere Limited's market positioning. The company's shares have reached the upper circuit on the BSE multiple times, reflecting strong investor confidence. Accedere Limited has also recently rewarded its investors with a 1:10 bonus.

  • Accedere Limited outperforming traditional IT service providers
  • Freebird Aerospace's technological innovations in AI
  • Successful deployment of NanoBee and NanoWasp platforms
  • Accedere Limited's shares reaching the upper circuit on the BSE
  • Recent 1:10 bonus for Accedere Limited's investors

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: E.COM INFOTECH (I) LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [INTELLECT] Intellect Design Arena Limited Announces Changes in Senior Management
item.description:
Intellect Design Arena Limited has informed the exchange about changes in its Senior Management. Mr. John Owen, President, Western Hemisphere, will be stepping down from his position effective the close of business hours on March 31, 2026. Mr. Kannan Ramasamy, Chief Partner Officer, will be retiring from his position effective the close of business hours on March 31, 2026. The company places on record its appreciation for their contributions.

  • Mr. John Owen to step down as President, Western Hemisphere on March 31, 2026
  • Mr. Kannan Ramasamy to retire as Chief Partner Officer on March 31, 2026
  • Company appreciates their contributions during their tenures

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Intellect Design Arena Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [CPML] City Pulse Multiventures Ltd Board Meeting on 18/03/2026 Cancelled
item.description:
The Board Meeting of City Pulse Multiventures Ltd, originally scheduled for March 18, 2026, has been cancelled due to the unavailability of the Directors. This decision comes after the adjournment of the same meeting, which was previously intimated on March 04, 2026. The company has requested that this information be taken on record.

  • City Pulse Multiventures Ltd Board Meeting on 18/03/2026 cancelled
  • Cancellation due to unavailability of Directors
  • Meeting was previously adjourned on March 04, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: City Pulse Multiplex Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RECLTD] REC Ltd Declares 4th Interim Dividend @ 32% for FY 2025-26
item.description:
REC Limited, in its Board Meeting held on March 16, 2026, declared a 4th interim dividend of 32% (i.e. 23.20/- per equity share) for the financial year 2025-26. The record date for the dividend is fixed as March 20, 2026, and the payment is to be made on or before April 14, 2026. Shareholders are required to submit necessary documents for TDS exemption or lower deduction by March 20, 2026. The dividend payment will be made exclusively through electronic mode, and members are advised to update their bank account details accordingly.

  • REC Ltd declares 4th interim dividend @ 32% for FY 2025-26
  • Record date for dividend payment is March 20, 2026
  • Dividend payment to be made on or before April 14, 2026
  • Shareholders required to submit necessary documents for TDS exemption or lower deduction by March 20, 2026
  • Dividend payment to be made exclusively through electronic mode

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: REC Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [RECLTD] REC Ltd Declares 4th Interim Dividend @ 32% for FY 2025-26
item.description:
REC Limited, in its Board Meeting held on March 16, 2026, declared a 4th interim dividend of 32% (i.e. 23.20/- per equity share) for the financial year 2025-26. The record date for the dividend is fixed as March 20, 2026, and the payment is to be made on or before April 14, 2026. The Company is required to deduct tax at source (TDS) at the rates prescribed under the Income Tax Act, 1961. Shareholders are required to submit necessary documents for TDS exemption or lower deduction on or before March 20, 2026. The dividend payment will be made exclusively through electronic mode, and members are advised to update their bank account details accordingly.

  • REC Ltd declares 4th interim dividend @ 32% for FY 2025-26
  • The record date for the dividend is fixed as March 20, 2026
  • TDS will be deducted at the rates prescribed under the Income Tax Act, 1961
  • Shareholders are required to submit necessary documents for TDS exemption or lower deduction by March 20, 2026
  • Dividend payment will be made exclusively through electronic mode

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: REC Ltd | Category: Dividend
